chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تُكْرَهُ مُعَامَلَتُهُ وَ مُخَالَطَتُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The ones with whom dealings and inter-mingling is abhorred

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
text: هُ قَالَ إِيَّاكَ وَ مُخَالَطَةَ السَّفِلَةِ فَإِنَّ السَّفِلَةَ لَا يَئُولُ إِلَى خَيْرٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from Al Husayn Bin Mayyah, from Isa,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Beware of inter-mingling with the lowly people (rif-raff), for the lowly do not lead to the goodness’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from in a marfu’ manner’ the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Avoid forming contracts with people who suffer from crippling diseases; they do (not avoid transmitting their disease to others) the most unjust things.’”
